name: Horse riding on the Camí de Cavalls (Son Bou)
description: Ride a stretch of the Camí de Cavalls on horseback beside the great beach of Son Bou and its wetland, at the calm pace of the Menorcan horse. A serene, different way to feel the landscape, suited to families and beginner riders.

highlights: a 1-hour family route across the meadow and wetland of Son Bou (from age 5)
a 2-hour route along the coast for all levels, adjusting the horse's pace
departure beside Torre Solí Nou, next to the Jardín de Menorca hotel
